---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem or use case

What problem does this solve, or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature or change you’d like (e.g. new flag, new matcher type, new output format).

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Examples, mockups, or references to similar behavior in other tools.
